falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong bullish momentum contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a breakout rather than a potential bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would suggest extreme bullish pressure, invalidating the current 'HOLD' by confirming a potential reversal rather than a continuation of the prior pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a confirmed breakout or panic selling, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and proving the pattern is not a bottom but a blowoff.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
